subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down in truth from God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting. Verily, it heraldeth unto mankind this Most Great Light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق من لدی الله المهیمن القیوم انه یبشر الناس بهذا النور الاعظم
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
